final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: infographic-diagram
Asset type: travel brochure, tri-fold leaflet mockup
Primary request: a realistic tri-fold travel brochure for "杭州市4天3晚" (Hangzhou 4-day 3-night itinerary) floating above kraft paper card, with famous landmarks as 3D pins/markers
Scene/backdrop: authentic Hangzhou city map as the main background, with the tri-fold brochure suspended/floating above textured kraft cardboard
Subject: tri-fold travel brochure featuring 4-day itinerary with landmark icons for 断桥残雪, 雷峰塔, 灵隐寺, 九溪烟树, 西溪湿地, each destination marked with distinctive landmark symbols (pagoda, bridge, temple, bamboo forest, wetland)
Style/medium: photorealistic product mockup, editorial photography, paper craft aesthetic
Composition/framing: top-down angled view, showing the tri-fold brochure partially open with visible itinerary sections, floating 2cm above kraft paper base
Lighting/mood: soft studio lighting with gentle shadows, clean and premium travel guide aesthetic
Color palette: warm kraft brown + Hangzhou map blues and greens + white brochure with accent colors for each district
Materials/textures: realistic paper texture for brochure, matte kraft cardboard, glossy map print, subtle embossing on landmark icons
Text (verbatim): "杭州市4天3晚", "第一天：西湖经典游", "断桥残雪→白堤→孤山→曲院风荷→苏堤春晓→花港观鱼→雷峰塔→柳浪闻莺", "第二天：禅意杭州", "灵隐寺→飞来峰造像→法喜寺→宋城", "第三天：九溪烟树徒步", "九溪十八涧→龙井村→十里琅珰→云栖竹径", "第四天：文艺收官"
Constraints: must show authentic Hangzhou map as background, tri-fold format clearly visible, landmarks must have distinctive visual markers
Avoid: generic travel icons, blurry map details, flat 2D presentation without depth, watermark
